title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE TUPOL OESTE PRIMARY SCHOOL IN BARANGAY TUPOL OESTE, MUNICIPALITY OF CABATUAN, PROVINCE OF ILOILO, TO JULIAN B. PUEYO PRIMARY SCHOOL

chunks.text:
H. No. 25624 / 88 OG No. 26, 4109 (June 29, 1992)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7469, April 28, 1992 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE TUPOL OESTE PRIMARY SCHOOL IN BARANGAY TUPOL OESTE, MUNICIPALITY OF CABATUAN, PROVINCE OF ILOILO, TO JULIAN B. PUEYO PRIMARY SCHOOL

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Tupol Oeste Primary SchooI in Barangay Tupol 0este, Municipality of Cabatuan, Province of Iloilo, is hereby changed to Julian B. Pueyo Primary School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) NEPTALI A. GONZALES

(Sgd.) RAMON V. MITRA

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on April 5, 1990 and January 27, 1992, respectively.

(Sgd.) ANACLETO D. BADOY, JR.

(Sgd.) CAMILO L. SABIO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved: April 28, 1992

(Sgd.) CORAZON C. AQUINO

President of the Philippines
